objective: Replace the cultural-change pullquote with an original quote that connects Loop Marketing to continuous learning, experimentation and operational culture, without changing the published post.

blockers.message: No compatible refresh candidate exists for update_text at 276.
update_text is only allowed for safe_text_edit candidates.

operations.proposedText: 📌 El Loop Marketing no reemplaza la estrategia: reemplaza la espera. La ventaja ya no está en planear campañas perfectas, sino en aprender rápido, ajustar con datos y reinvertir cada señal en el próximo ciclo.
operations.rationale: Use an original content-aligned pullquote instead of a fragile external-stat citation, while preserving the Gutenberg pullquote block.

blockers.message: No compatible refresh candidate exists for update_text at 276.
update_text is only allowed for safe_text_edit candidates.

guardrails: Apply only to a draft/private clone after revalidating the source fingerprint.
Never patch the published source object from this plan.

nextStep.notes: The next command should create or prepare a draft/private clone plan. It is intentionally not implemented in this plan-only slice.

rollback.notes: This patch plan is a local artifact only. It performs no WordPress mutation, so rollback is deleting the artifact.
